title: OptiGrass
description: Optifine's Better Grass on Sodium/Vanilla! Looks better with Continuity.
body:
## About

Are you like me and really miss Optifine's "Better Grass" feature? Well now you can bring it back - without any mods and compatible with all versions! Works on vanilla Minecraft, but looks better with Continuity.

## How it looks
**With OptiGrass & Continuity**

![This is what Minecraft looks like with the intended way of using my pack!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2085749f6ce200cbbb091620bc0d6ba5da7e02e5_0.webp)

**With OptiGrass**

![This is what Minecraft looks like with texturepack, but without Continuity!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d3578f938d916a246bc3b8930de2f28f5dfc2ec_0.webp)

**Vanilla**

![Here's vanilla Minecraft for comparison!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51e57e31016eda339c2fa105bc6d10784ed9b52f_0.webp)

## Installation & Extras

Minimal installation required! Just download the pack and enjoy. Optionally, also install the Continuity Mod, which makes it look exactly like Optifine's original version.

[You want something more unique and fancy? Check out my other Grass-changing pack - which looks more dynamic!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/aesthetic-grass)

It is an original pack by me (SussyBauarbeiter). I appreciate anyone using this pack as inspiration/incorporating it in your packs - when credit to original code is given - but please don't directly steal :)
